zh.Towneley Hall, Lancashire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾堂勒 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Towneley於1447年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾華拉利時，他的父親John de Townley33歲，母親Isabel Sherburne45歲。他於1472年9月24日與Julianna de Southworth在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年9月8日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾堂勒 霍爾享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Towneley于1447年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾華拉利时，他的父亲John de Townley33岁，母亲Isabel Sherburne45岁。他于1472年9月24日与Julianna de Southworth在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年9月8日在英国英格兰藍卡爾堂勒 霍爾享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Towneley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Townley
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Towneley near Burnley in Lancashire, which is named with Middle English toun(e), ton(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn) + leie ‘glade, clearing’. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Towneley was born in 1447, in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Townley, was 33 and his mother, Isabel Sherburne, was 45. He married Julianna de Southworth on 24 September 1472, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 8 September 1482, in Towneley Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Towneley est né en 1447, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Townley, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel Sherburne, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Julianna de Southworth le 24 septembre 1472, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1482, à Towneley Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Towneleyが1447年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウアリーで生まれた時，父John de Townleyは33歳，母Isabel Sherburneは45歳であった。1472年9月24日にイギリスイギリスでJulianna de Southworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年9月8日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトウニリー ハルで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Towneley(이)가 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 화알리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Townley(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Sherburne(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1472년 9월 24일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Julianna de Southworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 타운리 홀에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Towneley родился в 1447 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Townley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Sherburne, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Julianna de Southworth 24 сентября 1472 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 сентября 1482 г. в местности тоунели холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.
